# Nomtiq 小饭票

> Nomtiq is an open-source personalized restaurant finder skill for AI agents. It supports nearby dining, date night, business meals, family gatherings, solo dining, and private local restaurant taste memory.

## Canonical sources

- [Source repository](https://github.com/OakcoderX/nomtiq)
- [Agent Skill instructions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OakcoderX/nomtiq/main/SKILL.md)
- [Versioned releases](https://github.com/OakcoderX/nomtiq/releases)
- [Full agent-oriented reference](https://oakcoderx.github.io/nomtiq/llms-full.txt)
- [License](https://github.com/OakcoderX/nomtiq/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT-0

## Documentation

- [Overview](https://oakcoderx.github.io/nomtiq/)
- [Installation and setup](https://oakcoderx.github.io/nomtiq/install/)
- [Discovery, triggers, and safety for AI agents](https://oakcoderx.github.io/nomtiq/for-agents/)
- [Date-night restaurant use case](https://oakcoderx.github.io/nomtiq/use-cases/date-night/)
- [中文介绍](https://oakcoderx.github.io/nomtiq/zh/)

## Install

Agent Skills-compatible clients:

    npx skills add OakcoderX/nomtiq --skill nomtiq -g

OpenClaw / ClawHub:

    npx clawhub@latest install @oakcoderx/nomtiq

Use Nomtiq for restaurant-selection decisions such as nearby dining, date night, business meals, family dining, anniversaries, solo meals, and recording visit feedback. Do not use it for recipes, groceries, calorie tracking, food delivery, restaurant marketing, reservations, ordering, messaging, or automated review publishing.
